race.comment: LULU DARLING (3) is racing well, placing in 4 of her 5 runs this time in, just finding a handy one too smart at Pakenham last time out over this distance. She can land in a handy, trailing position from the inside gate here and a repeat of last start sees her very hard to hold out. SMALL TOWN HERO (4) is another knocking on the door having just found one better in his past three. He'll put himself somewhere up near the pace and give a sight. GARNACHO (2) will be better over further but is still expected to sprint well fresh. I'M DYNAMITE (9) hasn't been far away of late and appears the next in line.
